title: acaena boliviana
intro: Acaena boliviana, also known as the Bolivian cat's ear or woolly cat's ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb with small white flowers and woolly foliage, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Acaena boliviana contains flavonoids and tannins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
